name: Apfelpfannkuchen (Apple Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, 2 teaspoons sugar, and salt.
2. Beat eggs and milk until combined.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture, beating until smooth.
4. Cook apples in 1/4 cup butter until tender.
5. Mix 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon; toss with apples.
6. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a 6-inch deep frying pan.
7. Pour batter into the pan to a depth of about 1/4 inch.
8. When set, place about 1/4 of the apples on top; cover with more batter.
9. Fry pancake until lightly browned on both sides. Keep warm.
10. Repeat steps 6-9 until all batter and apples are used. Serve immediately.
